All phases complete: A (CI artifact + PR promotion gate), B (objective manifest parser + drift detection), C (monoworkstream gate workflow + rollback tag scripts).

Validation ring stabilized: 9/10 route tests pass consensus, 1 legitimate gap detected (flourishing.js has no test coverage). _generate_jobs now scans all test files for route references instead of requiring exact filename match. Phase 9 passes cleanly in convergence loop.

notes: Validation ring is now the primary skepticism gate. Critical/high severity failures block promotion. Medium/low are warnings. Gemini key rate-limited until daily quota reset. Use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY as fallback for agent work.
